title: Restart DC and OF Interfaces on Servers 112 and 113

Restart OF Only: verify no ATM/POS transactions in progress
communicate with Zimswitch before restarting DC services
Restart DC Only: verify no ATM/POS transactions in progress
communicate with Zimswitch before restarting DC services

rollback: if interfaces fail to start, check configuration
notes: OF handles other Olifabric channel transactions
avoid restarting DC services unless communicated with Zimswitch
avoid using scripts stopDCOF.sh, startDCOF.sh, DCOnlystop.sh, DCOnlystart.sh unless critical
